svg.text: RING-0 KERNEL DRIVER -- endpoint_monitor_driver.sys (Rust WDM · Altitude 320000)
INGESTION -- SINGLE ETW SESSION + KERNEL BRIDGE
ParseEtwToPlatformEvent · JA3 fast-path · VirtualAlloc RWX detect
SPMC synchronous fan-out → all BackgroundService analyzers
RING-3 ANALYZER LANE -- Subscribe to TelemetryRouter (BackgroundService)
K-Means (4D) · DBSCAN beacon jitter · Isolation Forest lineage anomaly
UEBA temporal baselining · Shannon entropy · DGA / Fast-Flux detection
Statistical heuristics: CV · asymmetry · skewness · jitter · packet density
SQLite WAL · os_events · network_flows · ueba_baselines · unified_alerts
netsh advfirewall outbound block per destIp
Rust ML CRITICAL/HIGH alert · OsAnalyzer (ETW tamper / YARA)
▬ ETW/OS telemetry ▬ Kernel IPC (inverted call) ▬ TelemetryRouter fan-out ▬ BeaconSuspicion ▬ ML batch/alert ▬ Ring-0 enforcement - - - async/feedback
■ Glow = critical data junction · All analyzers are .NET 10 BackgroundService · xdr_ml_engine.dll = Rust cdylib · Driver = Rust WDM no_std
